message:
fix: use dirs::home_dir() instead of $HOME env var in TUI export dir resolution

Aligns tui_app.rs resolve_export_dir() with config.rs by using
dirs::home_dir() for consistent cross-platform home directory
discovery. The $HOME env var can differ from dirs::home_dir()
on macOS (NSHomeDirectory vs env var) and may be unset in some
contexts (launchd agents, sandboxed processes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
